text:
mdcp.cc:139:19: error: ordered comparison between pointer and zero ('unsigned long *' and 'int')
  if( buffer.used < 0 )
      ~~~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~
mdcp.cc:175:25: warning: comparison of unsigned expression < 0 is always false [-Wtautological-compare]
    if( buffer.used[nb] < 0 )
        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~
